\tzpentry{ID5655}{Propagator Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5655 introduces Propagator Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} v_{\rm rel} \sim v_K \sqrt{e^2 + I^2},\qquad v_K=\sqrt{\frac{GM_\odot}{a}}. \end{equation}
